backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing the Ghar Builder marketplace with authorization, user profiles, project management (CRUD operations with filtering by category/budget), and professional profile management (CRUD operations with filtering by specialty/experience).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting high-confidence implementation of all core features including homepage, project posting/browsing, professional profile creation/directory, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and styling, describing the construction marketplace UI with authentication, project/professional management, and filtering capabilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for construction-themed UI including primary, secondary, muted, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Ghar Builder application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, projects, professionals), ThemeProvider, Layout wrapper, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Authentication gate component displaying a card with shield icon and login button when unauthenticated users attempt to access protected routes.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo, navigation links (conditional on auth state), LoginButton, main content area, and footer with attribution and caffeine.ai link.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states, error handling for duplicate authentication, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to create one, collecting name (required), email, and phone number with form validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on authentication state, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBrowseProfessional: A React Query hook that fetches a filtered list of professionals from the backend based on specialty and minimum experience parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useBrowseProjects.ts: A React Query hook that fetches a filtered list of projects from the backend based on category and budget range parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateProfessional: A React Query mutation hook that creates a professional profile with name, specialty, experience, and service description, invalidating the professionals query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteProfessional: A React Query mutation hook that deletes a professional profile by ID and invalidates the professionals query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteProject.ts: A React Query mutation hook that deletes a project by ID and invalidates the projects query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile, with special handling for actor loading states and no retry on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetProfessional.ts: A React Query hook that fetches a single professional's details by their ID from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetProject.ts: A React Query hook that fetches a single project's details by its ID from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A comprehensive React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication state with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostProject.ts: A React Query mutation hook that creates a new project with title, description, budget range, and category, invalidating the projects query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: A React Query mutation hook that saves or updates the current user's profile and invalidates the user profile query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom construction-themed color palette using warm oranges, browns, and yellows for both light and dark modes, plus base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseProfessionalsPa: A page component for browsing and filtering construction professionals by specialty and minimum experience, displaying results in cards with specialty icons and badges.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseProjectsPage.ts: Displays a filterable list of construction projects with category, budget range filters, and project cards showing title, description, budget, and category. Uses useBrowseProjects hook to fetch and filter projects.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProfessionalPro: Form page for authenticated users to create a professional profile with name, specialty, experience, and service description. Redirects to the created profile on success and shows access denied for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, call-to-action buttons, and "How It Works" sections explaining the platform for both project owners and professionals. Features navigation to post projects and browse professionals.
frontend/src/pages/PostProjectPage.tsx: Form page for authenticated users to post construction projects with title, description, budget range, and category. Validates inputs and redirects to the created project detail page on success.
frontend/src/pages/ProfessionalDetailPag: Displays detailed information about a professional including name, specialty, experience, and service description. Allows profile owners to delete their own profiles with confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a construction project with category icons, budget formatting, and owner-only delete functionality using Internet Identity authentication and React Query hooks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, construction-themed shadows, extended typography, and custom animations for the Ghar Builder construction marketplace UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features for Ghar Builder construction marketplace, including homepage, project posting, professional profiles, Internet Identity auth, and construction-themed design requirements.
